description: Product Description Provide a soft, breathable and skin-friendly user experience. The hem is tight, the stitches are neat, the workmanship is exquisite, stable and durable. Stylish pattern design works with most salon styles. Adjustable metal buckle, easy to use, not easy to fall off, adjustable tightness. It fits different neck sizes and is flexible enough to meet all your needs. Use high-quality fabric, soft texture, breathable, antistatic, non-sticky. Ideal for any dyeing, processing or hair care. Protect your clothes from being soiled by colored hair, Cover your hair and keep it clean during the haircut.
